[console_scripts]
sac = scitex_agent_container.cli:cli_entry_point
sac-statusline = scitex_agent_container.statusline:main
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container.cli:cli_entry_point

[scitex_dev.docs]
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container

[scitex_dev.jobs]
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container._jobs_plugin:provide_jobs

[scitex_dev.linter.plugins]
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container._linter_plugin:get_plugin

[scitex_dev.skills]
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container

[scitex_todo.hooks]
scitex-agent-container = scitex_agent_container._listen._card_event_delivery:deliver_card_event
